WORLDWIDE

Jay Nadeau

Founder & Creative Director of Stōkt

Jay Nadeau

Founder & Creative Director of Stōkt

The Founder

Jay founded Stōkt in 2019 after spending the early part of his career in agencies. His ambition has always been to bring movement into traditionally static brand systems, a vision now fully aligned with today’s digital landscape.


His work blends art direction, motion, and web development, with a focus on cohesive, motion-driven brand systems. Working from concept to execution, Jay designs experiences guided by clarity, intent, and precision, believing aesthetics only matter when they serve a clear purpose.


From small to large-scale projects, Jay leads independently or assembles tailored teams as needed. Through Stōkt, he partners closely with brands seeking meaningful growth, remaining deeply involved to ensure every decision is intentional and built to last.

Jay founded Stōkt in 2019 after spending the early part of his career in agencies. His ambition has always been to bring movement into traditionally static brand systems, a vision now fully aligned with today’s digital landscape.


His work blends art direction, motion, and web development, with a focus on cohesive, motion-driven brand systems. Working from concept to execution, Jay designs experiences guided by clarity, intent, and precision, believing aesthetics only matter when they serve a clear purpose.


From small to large-scale projects, Jay leads independently or assembles tailored teams as needed. Through Stōkt, he partners closely with brands seeking meaningful growth, remaining deeply involved to ensure every decision is intentional and built to last.

( TESTIMONIALS )

Dont' take our word for it*

*Take theirs

  • Everyone at this level has technical competence, but Jay's actual superpowers are the care he takes to understand the goal, collaborate on solutions, communicate, and, yes, bring the vision to life. He was worth every penny and then some.

    LZ Granderson

    Creative Producer

  • Jay is a beast!! High quality work in a short timeframe. His motion and graphic work is truly gamechanging. Can't recommend him enough!

    Rishi Choudhary

    CEO & Co-Founder

    Kastle AI

  • Jay’s the real deal. Not only a Framer pro, but he truly cares—bringing ideas, polish, and extra miles we didn’t even ask for. On Lorikeet, he turned loose homepage hero concepts into a live staging link in just a day, completely reshaping what we thought was possible. Creative, proactive, and lightning-fast with QA, he delivers unique animations, smart solutions, and clear comms. Funny, honest, and a joy to work with—we can’t wait for the next project.

    Dinesh Dave

    Co-Founder & Creative Director

    Work is Play

  • Jay is a one-of-a-kind creative mind (in the best way possible!). He’s always coming up with mind-blowing ideas, and I've had the pleasure of working with him on various projects over the years. Jay consistently delivers exceptional results and never underperforms. I would highly recommend him for your next project—he’s essentially a Swiss Army knife of content creation.

    Max Trudel

    Director / DOP

    Side Hit Films

  • The man’s a chameleon, minus the clichés. While many designers get stuck in a "house style" (which can be as polarizing as pineapple on pizza), Jay’s versatility is his superpower. Over the years working with Boombox, he’s proven time and time again that no creative challenge is too big, too niche, or too wild. From 2D animations to 3D renders and even web design, Jay’s range is nothing short of extraordinary.

    Tj Walker

    Head of Production

    Boombox

  • Jay is truly in a league of his own. Not only is he incredibly talented and creative, but he’s also easy and fun to work with. The final result is hands down the best agency website I’ve ever seen. Couldn’t recommend him more.

    Max Gilberg

    Founding Partner & Creative Director

    Major Media Agency

  • Working with Jay was an absolute pleasure. He has a masterful understanding of design and what it takes to create stunning visuals. He was able to reimagine our brand imagery and build a brand new website in record time. I highly recommend him to any serious business owner who wants to create an unforgettable brand.

    Charles Lacasse

    Founder

    We Scale It

  • Working with Jay Nadeau was an absolute game-changer for my website (and the amount of compliments I got for it proves it)! His unique blend of expertise produced results that went far beyond my expectations. Hire Jay if you like working with a passionate and responsive designer that receives feedback with a smile and consistently elevates your ideas to the next level. I couldn’t recommend him more!

    Jeremie Bouchard

    Director + Editor

  • Working with Jay has been an absolute pleasure. He’s a true Framer expert—fast, precise, and collaborative. Beyond his technical skill, Jay brings a consistently positive, solution-oriented mindset and communicates with clarity and proactivity. He not only executed our website design in Framer flawlessly but also acted as a genuine thought partner throughout the process. Any creative team would be lucky to have him.

    Sofya Leonova

    Co-Founder + Operations Director

    Work is Play

  • Pleasure to work w/ Jay! We were first-time clients w/ no prior connection, but he treated us like long-time collaborators. He hit every detail we asked for (& more), keeping us informed during the process. Excited to work w/ him again.

    Lorenzo Belassen

    Strategy & Creative Director

    Enzo Drew

  • What a great find Jay was for us. He knew exactly what we needed in a matter of minutes. He did amazing work, which I can't wait to use. We will for sure keep working with Jay for our motion needs.

    Charles Vinette

    Founder, React Native Engineer

    App & Flow

  • Jay is a Framer God. We gave him our website overhaul—landing page, services, portfolio, contact—and he nailed it. Jay’s straightforward and creative approach made the process smooth. Will hire him again for sure in the near future!

    Jeremie Perreault

    Creative Director

    Slash Media House

  • I’ve been working with Jay on several projects over the past six years. His creative genius never disappoints and consistently elevates every project. Jay's expertise and broad skill set have been invaluable in adding depth and distinction to my storytelling. He stays on top of the latest trends and is always on the lookout for new tools and ways to deepen his knowledge.

    Justin Loiselle

    Director / Editor

    Boombox

Everyone at this level has technical competence, but Jay's actual superpowers are the care he takes to understand the goal, collaborate on solutions, communicate, and, yes, bring the vision to life. He was worth every penny and then some.
